Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most laboratory values are within normal limits. Mildly elevated blood chloride and platelet distribution width are noted, which may be clinically insignificant if asymptomatic. Urine specific gravity is slightly low, possibly indicating dilute urine or high fluid intake. No evidence of infection, hematuria, proteinuria, or glycosuria. Renal function, glucose, and hematological parameters are normal. No acute laboratory concerns identified; recommend clinical correlation.
